sql.query: SELECT w.id,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.status,w.startDate,w.targetDate,w.createdDate,wt.templateName,t.teamName,u.displayName AS ownerName,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT ws.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS stageCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ws.status='complete' THEN ws.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedStageCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT tk.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tk.status='complete' THEN tk.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedTaskCount,CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN rs.manualRiskOverride='red' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'red' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status IN ('blocked','internal_hold','external_hold') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'red' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'red' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN rs.manualRiskOverride='amber' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'amber' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'amber' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 'amber' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT tk.id)=0 OR w.targetDate IS NULL OR w.status IN ('draft','not_started') THEN 'grey' ELSE 'green' END AS riskLevel,CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN rs.manualRiskOverride='red' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN COALESCE(MAX(rs.riskReason),'Manual risk override') WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status IN ('blocked','internal_hold','external_hold') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN CONCAT('Blocked task: ',MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status IN ('blocked','internal_hold','external_hold') THEN tk.taskName END)) WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN CONCAT('Critical task overdue: ',MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN tk.taskName END)) WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN rs.manualRiskOverride='amber' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN COALESCE(MAX(rs.riskReason),'Manual risk override') WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN CONCAT('Task overdue: ',MAX(CASE WHEN tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN tk.taskName END)) WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN CONCAT('Critical task due within 7 days: ',MAX(CASE WHEN tk.priority IN ('urgent','critical') AND tk.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND tk.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN tk.taskName END)) WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT tk.id)=0 THEN 'No tasks exist' WHEN w.targetDate IS NULL THEN 'No target date' WHEN w.status IN ('draft','not_started') THEN 'Workflow not started' ELSE 'No overdue or blocked tasks' END AS riskReason FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=w.templateId AND wt.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams t ON t.id=w.ownerTeamId AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=w.ownerUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.workflowId=w.id AND ws.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks tk ON tk.workflowId=w.id AND tk.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_risk_status rs ON rs.workflowId=w.id AND rs.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY w.id ORDER BY w.modifiedDate DESC,w.id DESC
